```{r IMDdataObs, message=F, warning=F}
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

############ C1N ##############################################################

Sim.Res.ind_C1N <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C1N, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C1N <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind_C1N, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!!
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD")
  
  Nsortie = 2
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C1N <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C1N, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C1N <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1N, Endpt == "Weight" & Time !=0)
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C1N <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1N, Endpt == "CiIMD" & Time !=0)

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C1N, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |> 
  dplyr::select(-c(Weight_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_Weight_ind_C1N, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred"))|>
  dplyr::select(-c(CiIMD_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

############ C2 ##############################################################

Sim.Res.ind_C2 <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C2, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C2 <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind_C2, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!!
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD")
  
  Nsortie = 2
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C2 <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C2, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C2 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2, Endpt == "Weight" & Time !=0)
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2, Endpt == "CiIMD" & Time !=0)

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2 <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |> 
  dplyr::select(-c(Weight_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2 <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_Weight_ind_C2, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred"))|>
  dplyr::select(-c(CiIMD_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

############ C2P ##############################################################

Sim.Res.ind_C2P <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C2P, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C2P <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind_C2P, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!!
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD")
  
  Nsortie = 2
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C2P <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C2P, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C2P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2P, Endpt == "Weight" & Time !=0)
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2P, Endpt == "CiIMD" & Time !=0)

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2P <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2P, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |> 
  dplyr::select(-c(Weight_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_Weight_ind_C2P, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred"))|>
  dplyr::select(-c(CiIMD_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

############ C2N ##############################################################

Sim.Res.ind_C2N <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C2N, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C2N <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind_C2N, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!!
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD")
  
  Nsortie = 2
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C2N <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C2N, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C2N <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2N, Endpt == "Weight" & Time !=0)
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2N <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2N, Endpt == "CiIMD" & Time !=0)

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2N, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |> 
  dplyr::select(-c(Weight_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_Weight_ind_C2N, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred"))|>
  dplyr::select(-c(CiIMD_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

```

```{r RMSE, message=F, warning=F}
RMSE_C1 <- sqrt(mean((c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1$CiIMD_obs, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$Weight_obs) - c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$predict.endpoint))^2, na.rm = TRUE))
cat("RMSE(C1) = ", RMSE_C1)

RMSE_C1P <- sqrt(mean((c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P$CiIMD_obs, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$Weight_obs) - c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$predict.endpoint))^2, na.rm = TRUE))
cat("RMSE(C1P) = ", RMSE_C1P)

RMSE_C1N <- sqrt(mean((c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N$CiIMD_obs, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N$Weight_obs) - c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N$predict.endpoint))^2, na.rm = TRUE))
cat("RMSE(C1N) = ", RMSE_C1N)

RMSE_C2 <- sqrt(mean((c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2$CiIMD_obs, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$Weight_obs) - c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$predict.endpoint))^2, na.rm = TRUE))
cat("RMSE(C2) = ", RMSE_C2)

RMSE_C2P <- sqrt(mean((c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2P$CiIMD_obs, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P$Weight_obs) - c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2P$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P$predict.endpoint))^2, na.rm = TRUE))
cat("RMSE(C2P) = ", RMSE_C2P)

RMSE_C2N <- sqrt(mean((c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N$CiIMD_obs, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N$Weight_obs) - c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N$predict.endpoint))^2, na.rm = TRUE))
cat("RMSE(C2N) = ", RMSE_C2N)
```

::: panel-tabset
## C1

```{r predobsIMDC1, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Results of the model fit on experimental data. Predicted values are represented with points with their respective credibility interval of 95%. Thin black and grey lines represent the 2-folds and 5-fold changes, respectively. The thicker black line represents the identity line. 
#| label: fig-IMDpredobsC1
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1]
col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4]
col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1]

col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[2])

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1.5, 0.001)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

p_W <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1,
  mapping = aes(
      x = Weight_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up
    ),
    alpha = 0.5,
    color = col_IMD
  )+
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$Weight_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  scale_x_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  scale_y_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  labs(
    x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)",
    y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

lim_plot <- 3000 
col_exposure_bis <- c(Nord_aurora[1], Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[5])

shape_exposure_bis <- c(shape_IMD, shape_IMD, shape_EPX)

p_CiIMD_predobs <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1,
  mapping = aes(
      x = CiIMD_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_path(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up,
      color = Group,
      shape = Group
    ),
    alpha = 0.5#,
    #color = col_IMD
  )+
  
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1$CiIMD_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Observed concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)",
    y = "Predicted concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure_bis
    )+
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_exposure_bis)+
  scale_x_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  scale_y_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  theme_minimal()

p_predobs <- p_W + p_CiIMD_predobs
p_predobs

```

```{r savepredobsC1, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobs.png",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1
) 
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobs.svg",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1
)
```

```{r countfoldIMDC1, warning=F}

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1 <- df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1 |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / Weight_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - Weight_obs
  )

Weight_count_fold2_C1 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$Weight_obs) * 100

Weight_count_fold5_C1 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$Weight_obs) * 100

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1 <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1 |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / CiIMD_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs
  )

CiIMD_count_fold2_C1 <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1$CiIMD_obs) * 100

CiIMD_count_fold5_C1 <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1$CiIMD_obs) * 100

cat(
  "For weights : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(Weight_count_fold2_C1, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(Weight_count_fold5_C1, 1), "%"
)
cat(
  "\n\nFor internal concentrations : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold2_C1, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold5_C1, 1), "%"
)
```

## C1P

```{r predobsIMDC1P, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Results of the model fit on experimental data. Predicted values are represented with points with their respective credibility interval of 95%. Thin black and grey lines represent the 2-folds and 5-fold changes, respectively. The thicker black line represents the identity line. 
#| label: fig-IMDpredobsC1P
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1]
col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4]
col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1]

col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[2])

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1.5, 0.001)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

p_W <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P,
  mapping = aes(
      x = Weight_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up
    ),
    alpha = 0.5,
    color = col_IMD
  )+
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$Weight_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  scale_x_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  scale_y_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  labs(
    x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)",
    y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

lim_plot <- 3000 
col_exposure_bis <- c(Nord_aurora[1], Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[5])

shape_exposure_bis <- c(shape_IMD, shape_IMD, shape_EPX)

p_CiIMD_predobs <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P,
  mapping = aes(
      x = CiIMD_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_path(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up,
      color = Group,
      shape = Group
    ),
    alpha = 0.5#,
    #color = col_IMD
  )+
  
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P$CiIMD_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Observed concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)",
    y = "Predicted concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure_bis
    )+
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_exposure_bis)+
  scale_x_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  scale_y_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  theme_minimal()

p_predobs <- p_W + p_CiIMD_predobs
p_predobs

```

```{r savepredobsC1P, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobs.png",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1P
) 
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobs.svg",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1P
)
```

```{r countfoldIMDC1P, warning=F}

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P <- df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / Weight_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - Weight_obs
  )

Weight_count_fold2_C1P <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$Weight_obs) * 100

Weight_count_fold5_C1P <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$Weight_obs) * 100

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / CiIMD_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs
  )

CiIMD_count_fold2_C1P <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P$CiIMD_obs) * 100

CiIMD_count_fold5_C1P <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P$CiIMD_obs) * 100

cat(
  "For weights : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(Weight_count_fold2_C1P, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(Weight_count_fold5_C1P, 1), "%"
)
cat(
  "\n\nFor internal concentrations : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold2_C1P, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold5_C1P, 1), "%"
)
```

## C1N

```{r predobsIMDC1N, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Results of the model fit on experimental data. Predicted values are represented with points with their respective credibility interval of 95%. Thin black and grey lines represent the 2-folds and 5-fold changes, respectively. The thicker black line represents the identity line. 
#| label: fig-IMDpredobsC1N
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1]
col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4]
col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1]

col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[5])

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1.5, 0.001)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

p_W <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N,
  mapping = aes(
      x = Weight_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up
    ),
    alpha = 0.5,
    color = col_IMD
  )+
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N$Weight_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  scale_x_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  scale_y_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  labs(
    x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)",
    y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

lim_plot <- 3000 
col_exposure_bis <- c(Nord_aurora[1], Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[5])

shape_exposure_bis <- c(shape_IMD, shape_IMD, shape_EPX)

p_CiIMD_predobs <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N,
  mapping = aes(
      x = CiIMD_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_path(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up,
      color = Group,
      shape = Group
    ),
    alpha = 0.5#,
    #color = col_IMD
  )+
  
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N$CiIMD_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Observed concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)",
    y = "Predicted concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure_bis
    )+
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_exposure_bis)+
  scale_x_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  scale_y_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  theme_minimal()

p_predobs <- p_W + p_CiIMD_predobs
p_predobs

```

```{r savepredobsC1N, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobs.png",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1N
) 
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobs.svg",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1N
)
```

```{r countfoldIMDC1N, warning=F}

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N <- df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / Weight_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - Weight_obs
  )

Weight_count_fold2_C1N <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N$Weight_obs) * 100

Weight_count_fold5_C1N <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N$Weight_obs) * 100

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / CiIMD_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs
  )

CiIMD_count_fold2_C1N <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N$CiIMD_obs) * 100

CiIMD_count_fold5_C1N <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N$CiIMD_obs) * 100

cat(
  "For weights : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(Weight_count_fold2_C1N, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(Weight_count_fold5_C1N, 1), "%"
)
cat(
  "\n\nFor internal concentrations : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold2_C1N, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold5_C1N, 1), "%"
)
```

## C2

```{r predobsIMDC2, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Results of the model fit on experimental data. Predicted values are represented with points with their respective credibility interval of 95%. Thin black and grey lines represent the 2-folds and 5-fold changes, respectively. The thicker black line represents the identity line. 
#| label: fig-IMDpredobsC2
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1]
col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4]
col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1]

col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[2])

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1.5, 0.001)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

p_W <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2,
  mapping = aes(
      x = Weight_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up
    ),
    alpha = 0.5,
    color = col_IMD
  )+
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$Weight_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  scale_x_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  scale_y_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  labs(
    x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)",
    y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

lim_plot <- 3000 
col_exposure_bis <- c(Nord_aurora[1], Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[5])

shape_exposure_bis <- c(shape_IMD, shape_IMD, shape_EPX)

p_CiIMD_predobs <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2,
  mapping = aes(
      x = CiIMD_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_path(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up,
      color = Group,
      shape = Group
    ),
    alpha = 0.5#,
    #color = col_IMD
  )+
  
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2$CiIMD_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Observed concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)",
    y = "Predicted concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure_bis
    )+
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_exposure_bis)+
  scale_x_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  scale_y_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  theme_minimal()

p_predobs <- p_W + p_CiIMD_predobs
p_predobs

```

```{r savepredobsC2, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobs.png",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C2
) 
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobs.svg",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C2
)
```

```{r countfoldIMDC2, warning=F}

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2 <- df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2 |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / Weight_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - Weight_obs
  )

Weight_count_fold2_C2 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$Weight_obs) * 100

Weight_count_fold5_C2 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$Weight_obs) * 100

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2 <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2 |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / CiIMD_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs
  )

CiIMD_count_fold2_C2 <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2$CiIMD_obs) * 100

CiIMD_count_fold5_C2 <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2$CiIMD_obs) * 100

cat(
  "For weights : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(Weight_count_fold2_C2, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(Weight_count_fold5_C2, 1), "%"
)
cat(
  "\n\nFor internal concentrations : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold2_C2, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold5_C2, 1), "%"
)
```

## C2P

```{r predobsIMDC2P, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Results of the model fit on experimental data. Predicted values are represented with points with their respective credibility interval of 95%. Thin black and grey lines represent the 2-folds and 5-fold changes, respectively. The thicker black line represents the identity line. 
#| label: fig-IMDpredobsC2P
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1]
col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4]
col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1]

col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[2])

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1.5, 0.001)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

p_W <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P,
  mapping = aes(
      x = Weight_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up
    ),
    alpha = 0.5,
    color = col_IMD
  )+
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P$Weight_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  scale_x_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  scale_y_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  labs(
    x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)",
    y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

lim_plot <- 3000 
col_exposure_bis <- c(Nord_aurora[1], Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[5])
shape_exposure_bis <- c(shape_IMD, shape_IMD, shape_EPX)

p_CiIMD_predobs <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2P,
  mapping = aes(
      x = CiIMD_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_path(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up,
      color = Group,
      shape = Group
    ),
    alpha = 0.5#,
    #color = col_IMD
  )+
  
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2P$CiIMD_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2P$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Observed concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)",
    y = "Predicted concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure_bis
    )+
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_exposure_bis)+
  scale_x_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  scale_y_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  theme_minimal()

p_predobs <- p_W + p_CiIMD_predobs
p_predobs

```

```{r savepredobsC2P, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobs.png",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C2P
) 

ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobs.svg",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C2P
)
```

```{r countfoldIMDC2P, warning=F}

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P <- df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / Weight_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - Weight_obs
  )

Weight_count_fold2_C2P <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P$Weight_obs) * 100

Weight_count_fold5_C2P <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P$Weight_obs) * 100

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2P <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2P |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / CiIMD_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs
  )

CiIMD_count_fold2_C2P <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2P$CiIMD_obs) * 100

CiIMD_count_fold5_C2P <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2P$CiIMD_obs) * 100

cat(
  "For weights : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(Weight_count_fold2_C2P, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(Weight_count_fold5_C2P, 1), "%"
)
cat(
  "\n\nFor internal concentrations : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold2_C2P, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold5_C2P, 1), "%"
)
```

## C2N

```{r predobsIMDC2N, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Results of the model fit on experimental data. Predicted values are represented with points with their respective credibility interval of 95%. Thin black and grey lines represent the 2-folds and 5-fold changes, respectively. The thicker black line represents the identity line. 
#| label: fig-IMDpredobsC2N
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1]
col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4]
col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1]

col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[2])

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1.5, 0.001)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

p_W <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N,
  mapping = aes(
      x = Weight_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up
    ),
    alpha = 0.5,
    color = col_IMD
  )+
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N$Weight_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  scale_x_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  scale_y_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  labs(
    x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)",
    y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

lim_plot <- 3000
col_exposure_bis <- c(Nord_aurora[1], Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[5])
shape_exposure_bis <- c(shape_IMD, shape_IMD, shape_EPX)

p_CiIMD_predobs <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N,
  mapping = aes(
      x = CiIMD_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_path(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up,
      color = Group,
      shape = Group
    ),
    alpha = 0.5#,
    #color = col_IMD
  )+
  
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N$CiIMD_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Observed concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)",
    y = "Predicted concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure_bis
    )+
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_exposure_bis)+
  scale_x_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  scale_y_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  theme_minimal()

p_predobs <- p_W + p_CiIMD_predobs
p_predobs

```

```{r savepredobsC2N, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobs.png",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C2N
)

ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobs.svg",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C2N
)
```

```{r countfoldIMDC2N, warning=F}

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N <- df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / Weight_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - Weight_obs
  )

Weight_count_fold2_C2N <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N$Weight_obs) * 100

Weight_count_fold5_C2N <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N$Weight_obs) * 100

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / CiIMD_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs
  )

CiIMD_count_fold2_C2N <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N$CiIMD_obs) * 100

CiIMD_count_fold5_C2N <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N$CiIMD_obs) * 100

cat(
  "For weights : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(Weight_count_fold2_C2N, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(Weight_count_fold5_C2N, 1), "%"
)
cat(
  "\n\nFor internal concentrations : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold2_C2N, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold5_C2N, 1), "%"
)
```
:::

::: panel-tabset
## C1

```{r, message=F, warning=FALSE}
#| fig-cap: Residuals
#| label: fig-IMDresidualsC1
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

df_residuals_CiIMD_C1 <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1 |> 
  mutate(
    Residual = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs,
    Ratio_Residual = predict.endpoint/CiIMD_obs
    ) |> 
  mutate(
    Time_point = as.numeric(as.character(Time_point_f)),
    Group = factor(Group, c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Uptake bis")),
    Time_relative = case_when(
      Group == "Uptake" ~ Time_point,
      Group == "TK_BIS" ~ Time_point,
      Group == "Elimination" ~ Time_point - 21
    )
    )

p_residus <- ggplot(df_residuals_CiIMD_C1)+
  geom_point(
    aes(
      x = Time_point,
      y = Ratio_Residual,
      color = Group
    ),
    alpha=0.7
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Time point (days)",
    y = "Predicted/observed ratio"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure
    )+
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = unique(df_residuals_CiIMD_C1$Time_point)
  )+
  scale_y_log10()+
  theme_minimal()

p_residus
```

```{r saveresidC1, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobsratio.png",
  plot = p_residus,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1
)

ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobsratio.svg",
  plot = p_residus,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1
)
```

## C1P

```{r, message=F, warning=FALSE}
#| fig-cap: Residuals
#| label: fig-IMDresidualsC1P
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

df_residuals_CiIMD_C1P <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P |> 
  mutate(
    Residual = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs,
    Ratio_Residual = predict.endpoint/CiIMD_obs
    ) |> 
  mutate(
    Time_point = as.numeric(as.character(Time_point_f)),
    Group = factor(Group, c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Uptake bis")),
    Time_relative = case_when(
      Group == "Uptake" ~ Time_point,
      Group == "TK_BIS" ~ Time_point,
      Group == "Elimination" ~ Time_point - 21
    )
    )

p_residus <- ggplot(df_residuals_CiIMD_C1P)+
  geom_point(
    aes(
      x = Time_point,
      y = Ratio_Residual,
      color = Group
    ),
    alpha=0.7
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Time point (days)",
    y = "Predicted/observed ratio"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure
    )+
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = unique(df_residuals_CiIMD_C1P$Time_point)
  )+
  scale_y_log10()+
  theme_minimal()

p_residus
```

```{r saveresidC1P, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobsratio.png",
  plot = p_residus,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1P
)

ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobsratio.svg",
  plot = p_residus,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1P
)
```

## C1N

```{r, message=F, warning=FALSE}
#| fig-cap: Residuals
#| label: fig-IMDresidualsC1N
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

df_residuals_CiIMD_C1N <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N |> 
  mutate(
    Residual = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs,
    Ratio_Residual = predict.endpoint/CiIMD_obs
    ) |> 
  mutate(
    Time_point = as.numeric(as.character(Time_point_f)),
    Group = factor(Group, c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Uptake bis")),
    Time_relative = case_when(
      Group == "Uptake" ~ Time_point,
      Group == "TK_BIS" ~ Time_point,
      Group == "Elimination" ~ Time_point - 21
    )
    )

p_residus <- ggplot(df_residuals_CiIMD_C1N)+
  geom_point(
    aes(
      x = Time_point,
      y = Ratio_Residual,
      color = Group
    ),
    alpha=0.7
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Time point (days)",
    y = "Predicted/observed ratio"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure
    )+
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = unique(df_residuals_CiIMD_C1N$Time_point)
  )+
  scale_y_log10()+
  theme_minimal()

p_residus
```

```{r saveresidC1N, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobsratio.png",
  plot = p_residus,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1N
)

ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobsratio.svg",
  plot = p_residus,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1N
)
```

## C2

```{r, message=F, warning=FALSE}
#| fig-cap: Residuals
#| label: fig-IMDresidualsC2
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

df_residuals_CiIMD_C2 <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2 |> 
  mutate(
    Residual = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs,
    Ratio_Residual = predict.endpoint/CiIMD_obs
    ) |> 
  mutate(
    Time_point = as.numeric(as.character(Time_point_f)),
    Group = factor(Group, c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Uptake bis")),
    Time_relative = case_when(
      Group == "Uptake" ~ Time_point,
      Group == "TK_BIS" ~ Time_point,
      Group == "Elimination" ~ Time_point - 21
    )
    )

p_residus <- ggplot(df_residuals_CiIMD_C2)+
  geom_point(
    aes(
      x = Time_point,
      y = Ratio_Residual,
      color = Group
    ),
    alpha=0.7
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Time point (days)",
    y = "Predicted/observed ratio"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure
    )+
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = unique(df_residuals_CiIMD_C2$Time_point)
  )+
  scale_y_log10()+
  theme_minimal()

p_residus
```

```{r saveresidC2, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobsratio.png",
  plot = p_residus,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C2
)

ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobsratio.svg",
  plot = p_residus,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C2
)
```

## C2P

```{r, message=F, warning=FALSE}
#| fig-cap: Residuals
#| label: fig-IMDresidualsC2P
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

df_residuals_CiIMD_C2P <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2P |> 
  mutate(
    Residual = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs,
    Ratio_Residual = predict.endpoint/CiIMD_obs
    ) |> 
  mutate(
    Time_point = as.numeric(as.character(Time_point_f)),
    Group = factor(Group, c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Uptake bis")),
    Time_relative = case_when(
      Group == "Uptake" ~ Time_point,
      Group == "TK_BIS" ~ Time_point,
      Group == "Elimination" ~ Time_point - 21
    )
    )

p_residus <- ggplot(df_residuals_CiIMD_C2P)+
  geom_point(
    aes(
      x = Time_point,
      y = Ratio_Residual,
      color = Group
    ),
    alpha=0.7
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Time point (days)",
    y = "Predicted/observed ratio"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure
    )+
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = unique(df_residuals_CiIMD_C2P$Time_point)
  )+
  scale_y_log10()+
  theme_minimal()

p_residus
```

```{r saveresidC2P, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobsratio.png",
  plot = p_residus,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C2P
)

ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobsratio.svg",
  plot = p_residus,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C2P
)
```

## C2N

```{r, message=F, warning=FALSE}
#| fig-cap: Residuals
#| label: fig-IMDresidualsC2N
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

df_residuals_CiIMD_C2N <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N |> 
  mutate(
    Residual = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs,
    Ratio_Residual = predict.endpoint/CiIMD_obs
    ) |> 
  mutate(
    Time_point = as.numeric(as.character(Time_point_f)),
    Group = factor(Group, c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Uptake bis")),
    Time_relative = case_when(
      Group == "Uptake" ~ Time_point,
      Group == "TK_BIS" ~ Time_point,
      Group == "Elimination" ~ Time_point - 21
    )
    )

p_residus <- ggplot(df_residuals_CiIMD_C2N)+
  geom_point(
    aes(
      x = Time_point,
      y = Ratio_Residual,
      color = Group
    ),
    alpha=0.7
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Time point (days)",
    y = "Predicted/observed ratio"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure
    )+
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = unique(df_residuals_CiIMD_C2N$Time_point)
  )+
  scale_y_log10()+
  theme_minimal()

p_residus
```

```{r saveresidC2N, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobsratio.png",
  plot = p_residus,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C2N
)

ggsave(
  filename = "TK_IMD_predobsratio.svg",
  plot = p_residus,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C2N
)
```
:::

### Full individual trajectories

Creation of the `.in` files that will enable the obtention of the prediction of the full $C_i^{EPX}$ trajectories for each individual :

```{r setpointindfullin, message=F, warning=F}
Time_min <- 0

Time_max <- 44
Time_step <- 0.25
Time_pred <- seq(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step)
print_times <- paste(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step, sep=", ")
Molecule <- "IMD"


f_Setpoint_ind_full(path_mod_IMD_C1, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_C1)
f_Setpoint_ind_full(path_mod_IMD_C1P, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_C1P)
f_Setpoint_ind_full(path_mod_IMD_C1N, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_C1N)
f_Setpoint_ind_full(path_mod_IMD_C2, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_C2)
f_Setpoint_ind_full(path_mod_IMD_C2P, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_C2P)
f_Setpoint_ind_full(path_mod_IMD_C2N, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_C2N)

dObs_ind <- df_TK_IMD |> 
  mutate(ID = as.numeric(ID))
colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "Weight"] <- "Weight_obs"
colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "CiIMD"] <- "CiIMD_obs"
colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "t"] <- "Times"

time_limits <- dObs_ind %>%
  group_by(ID) %>%
  summarise(time_cutoff = max(Time, na.rm = TRUE) + 5)

Time_points_Nb_rep <- dObs_ind |> 
  dplyr::select(ID, Time_point_f, Nb_rep)

y_segment <- 2000

df_phases <- dObs_ind |>
  arrange(ID, Time) |>
  group_by(ID) |>
  mutate(
    row = row_number(),
    t_start = Time,
    t_end = lead(Time),  
    segment = row,
    y = y_segment
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(t_end)) |>  
  dplyr::select(ID, segment, t_start, t_end, y, Experiment) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(
    Phase = case_when(
      (segment == 1 & ID < 65) ~ 1,
      (segment == 2 & ID < 65) ~ 3,
      (segment == 1 & ID > 64) ~ 1,
      (segment == 2 & ID > 64) ~ 2,
      (segment == 3 & ID > 64) ~ 3,
      (Experiment == "TKBIS" & segment == 1)~1,
      (Experiment == "TKBIS" & segment == 2)~3
    )
  )
```

An example of how to run the simulations for the individual trajectories is given in the bash code block below. You need to be in the right folder to launch a given model.

```{bash, results=F, eval=F}
pwd
cd ..
cd ..
cd mod/TK_IMD
pwd

for j in $(seq 1 73); do
./mcsim.m_TK_IMD TK_IMD_Setpoint_ind_full_${j}.in
done

```

```{r IMDdatapredfull, message=F, warning=F}
##| cache: false

#nb_rows_ind <- NC*N_iter_setpoint+1

############### C1 ###################################################
Sim.Res.ind.full_C1 <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C1, paste0("Setpoints_ind_full_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C1 <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){

  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind.full_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind.full_C1, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD", "C_exposure")
  
  Nsortie = length(Nom_Endpoints)
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind.full_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind.full_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C1 <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C1, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C1<- subset(df_mod_ind_C1, Endpt == "Weight")
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C1 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1, Endpt == "CiIMD")
df_mod_CeIMD_ind_C1 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1, Endpt == "C_exposure")

df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_C1 <- df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C1 %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C1 <- df_mod_Weight_ind_C1 %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t_C1 <- df_mod_CeIMD_ind_C1 %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

############### C1P ###################################################
Sim.Res.ind.full_C1P <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C1P, paste0("Setpoints_ind_full_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C1P <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){

  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind.full_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind.full_C1P, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD", "C_exposure")
  
  Nsortie = length(Nom_Endpoints)
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind.full_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind.full_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C1P <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C1P, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C1P<- subset(df_mod_ind_C1P, Endpt == "Weight")
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C1P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1P, Endpt == "CiIMD")
df_mod_CeIMD_ind_C1P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1P, Endpt == "C_exposure")

df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_C1P <- df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C1P %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C1P <- df_mod_Weight_ind_C1P %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t_C1P <- df_mod_CeIMD_ind_C1P %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

############### C1N ###################################################
Sim.Res.ind.full_C1N <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C1N, paste0("Setpoints_ind_full_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C1N <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){

  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind.full_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind.full_C1N, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD", "C_exposure")
  
  Nsortie = length(Nom_Endpoints)
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind.full_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind.full_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C1N <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C1N, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C1N<- subset(df_mod_ind_C1N, Endpt == "Weight")
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C1N <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1N, Endpt == "CiIMD")
df_mod_CeIMD_ind_C1N <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1N, Endpt == "C_exposure")

df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_C1N <- df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C1N %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C1N <- df_mod_Weight_ind_C1N %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t_C1N <- df_mod_CeIMD_ind_C1N %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

############### C2 ###################################################
Sim.Res.ind.full_C2 <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C2, paste0("Setpoints_ind_full_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C2 <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){

  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind.full_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind.full_C2, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD", "C_exposure")
  
  Nsortie = length(Nom_Endpoints)
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind.full_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind.full_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C2 <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C2, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C2<- subset(df_mod_ind_C2, Endpt == "Weight")
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2, Endpt == "CiIMD")
df_mod_CeIMD_ind_C2 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2, Endpt == "C_exposure")

df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_C2 <- df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2 %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C2 <- df_mod_Weight_ind_C2 %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t_C2 <- df_mod_CeIMD_ind_C2 %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

############### C2P ###################################################
Sim.Res.ind.full_C2P <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C2P, paste0("Setpoints_ind_full_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C2P <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){

  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind.full_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind.full_C2P, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD", "C_exposure")
  
  Nsortie = length(Nom_Endpoints)
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind.full_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind.full_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C2P <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C2P, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C2P<- subset(df_mod_ind_C2P, Endpt == "Weight")
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2P, Endpt == "CiIMD")
df_mod_CeIMD_ind_C2P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2P, Endpt == "C_exposure")

df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_C2P <- df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2P %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C2P <- df_mod_Weight_ind_C2P %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t_C2P <- df_mod_CeIMD_ind_C2P %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

############### C2N ###################################################
Sim.Res.ind.full_C2N <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C2N, paste0("Setpoints_ind_full_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C2N <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){

  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind.full_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind.full_C2N, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD", "C_exposure")
  
  Nsortie = length(Nom_Endpoints)
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind.full_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind.full_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C2N <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C2N, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C2N<- subset(df_mod_ind_C2N, Endpt == "Weight")
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2N <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2N, Endpt == "CiIMD")
df_mod_CeIMD_ind_C2N <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2N, Endpt == "C_exposure")

df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_C2N <- df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2N %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C2N <- df_mod_Weight_ind_C2N %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t_C2N <- df_mod_CeIMD_ind_C2N %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")


#########################

library(ggforce)

ID_tri <- unique(df_TK_IMD$ID)

dObs_ind_plot <- dObs_ind |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na() |> 
  filter(ID %in% ID_tri)|> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
    )

df_phases_plot <- subset(df_phases, ID %in% ID_tri)|> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID") |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
    )

```

::::::::: panel-tabset
## C1

::: panel-tabset
## Internal concentrations - Normal scale

```{r IMDpredcurvesdataC1, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the IMD concentration in earthworms exposed to 100 ng/g of IMD. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-IMDdatapredfullC1
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20


df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1 <- subset(df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_C1, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t_plot_C1 <- subset(df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t_C1, ID %in% ID_tri)
df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1 <- subset(df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C1, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

alpha_point <- 0.5
col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[2], Nord_aurora[3], Nord_aurora[4])

p_CiIMD_traj <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_IMD,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_IMD,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiIMD_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  # facet_wrap(
  #   ~ID,
  #   ncol=4,
  #   #scales = "free_x"
  #   )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiIMD (ng/g)"
  )+
  #lims(y=c(0, 300))+
  theme_minimal()
  

p_CiIMD_traj 

```

```{r, include=F}

Time_point_1 <- as.character(seq(22, 42, 1))

df_phases_plot_1 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1_1 <- df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1 |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))
dObs_ind_plot_1 <- dObs_ind_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))

df_phases_plot_2 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1_2 <- df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1 |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)
dObs_ind_plot_2 <- dObs_ind_plot |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)

p_CiIMD_traj_1 <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot_1,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_IMD,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_IMD,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot_1,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiIMD_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiIMD (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p_CiIMD_traj_2 <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot_2,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_IMD,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_IMD,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot_2,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiIMD_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiIMD (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()
  
```

## Internal concentrations - Log-scale

```{r, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the IMD concentration in earthworms exposed to 100 ng/g of IMD. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-IMDdatapredfulllogC1
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20

p_CiIMD_traj_log <- p_CiIMD_traj + scale_y_log10()

p_CiIMD_traj_log

```

## Weights

```{r IMDpredcurvesdataWC1, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Weight predictions
#| fig-label: fig-IMDdatapredfullWC1
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20

alpha_point <- 0.5

p_W <- ggplot()+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_IMD,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1, 
    aes(
      x=Time, 
      ymax= up, 
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_IMD,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = Weight_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+

  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  #lims(y=c(0, 1500))+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "Weight (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p_W

```

```{r savetrajC1, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpred.png", 
  plot=p_CiIMD_traj , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpred.svg", 
  plot=p_CiIMD_traj , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpred_log.png", 
  plot=p_CiIMD_traj_log , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpred_log.svg", 
  plot=p_CiIMD_traj_log , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpredW.png", 
  plot=p_W , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpredW.svg", 
  plot=p_W , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )

ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpred_1.png", 
  plot=p_CiIMD_traj_1, 
  width=8, height = 10, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )

ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpred_2.png", 
  plot=p_CiIMD_traj_2 , 
  width=8, height = 10, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
```
:::

## C1P

::: panel-tabset
## Internal concentrations - Normal scale

```{r IMDpredcurvesdataC1P, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the IMD concentration in earthworms exposed to 100 ng/g of IMD. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-IMDdatapredfullC1P
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20


df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1P <- subset(df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_C1P, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t_plot_C1P <- subset(df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t_C1P, ID %in% ID_tri)
df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1P <- subset(df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C1P, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

alpha_point <- 0.5
col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[2], Nord_aurora[3], Nord_aurora[4])

p_CiIMD_traj <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_IMD,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_IMD,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiIMD_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  # facet_wrap(
  #   ~ID,
  #   ncol=4,
  #   #scales = "free_x"
  #   )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiIMD (ng/g)"
  )+
  #lims(y=c(0, 300))+
  theme_minimal()
  

p_CiIMD_traj 

```

```{r, include=F}

Time_point_1 <- as.character(seq(22, 42, 1))

df_phases_plot_1 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1P_1 <- df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1P |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))
dObs_ind_plot_1 <- dObs_ind_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))

df_phases_plot_2 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1P_2 <- df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1P |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)
dObs_ind_plot_2 <- dObs_ind_plot |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)

p_CiIMD_traj_1 <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot_1,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1P_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1P_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1P_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_IMD,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1P_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_IMD,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot_1,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiIMD_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
```
